sourcesContent:
/**
 * 造字工坊 — 部首＋邊旁組合資料
 * 每組部首包含多個 { component, result } 配對
 */
export const RADICAL_COMBINE_DATA = [
  { radical: "艹", pairs: [{ component: "早", result: "草" }, { component: "化", result: "花" }, { component: "古", result: "苦" }, { component: "明", result: "萌" }, { component: "各", result: "落" }, { component: "每", result: "莓" }, { component: "包", result: "苞" }, { component: "加", result: "茄" }, { component: "何", result: "荷" }, { component: "夢", result: "蒙" }] },
  { radical: "氵", pairs: [{ component: "每", result: "海" }, { component: "可", result: "河" }, { component: "胡", result: "湖" }, { component: "青", result: "清" }, { component: "吉", result: "潔" }, { component: "皮", result: "波" }, { component: "主", result: "注" }, { component: "白", result: "泊" }, { component: "少", result: "沙" }, { component: "令", result: "泠" }] },
  { radical: "木", pairs: [{ component: "目", result: "相" }, { component: "才", result: "材" }, { component: "交", result: "校" }, { component: "風", result: "楓" }, { component: "東", result: "棟" }, { component: "反", result: "板" }, { component: "寸", result: "村" }, { component: "果", result: "棵" }, { component: "昆", result: "棍" }, { component: "喬", result: "橋" }] },
  { radical: "火", pairs: [{ component: "山", result: "災" }, { component: "者", result: "煮" }, { component: "然", result: "燃" }, { component: "登", result: "燈" }, { component: "因", result: "煙" }, { component: "尞", result: "燎" }, { component: "堯", result: "燒" }, { component: "少", result: "炒" }] },
  { radical: "亻", pairs: [{ component: "立", result: "位" }, { component: "建", result: "健" }, { component: "尤", result: "優" }, { component: "象", result: "像" }, { component: "更", result: "便" }, { component: "半", result: "伴" }, { component: "寺", result: "侍" }, { component: "至", result: "侄" }, { component: "白", result: "伯" }, { component: "主", result: "住" }] },
  { radical: "口", pairs: [{ component: "大", result: "吞" }, { component: "乞", result: "吃" }, { component: "合", result: "哈" }, { component: "甘", result: "甜" }, { component: "欠", result: "吹" }, { component: "巴", result: "吧" }, { component: "令", result: "命" }, { component: "各", result: "咯" }] },
  { radical: "言", pairs: [{ component: "果", result: "課" }, { component: "寺", result: "詩" }, { component: "式", result: "試" }, { component: "五", result: "語" }, { component: "兌", result: "說" }, { component: "周", result: "調" }, { component: "侖", result: "論" }, { component: "青", result: "請" }] },
  { radical: "心", pairs: [{ component: "相", result: "想" }, { component: "咸", result: "感" }, { component: "亡", result: "忙" }, { component: "生", result: "性" }, { component: "田", result: "思" }, { component: "旦", result: "悶" }, { component: "青", result: "情" }, { component: "吳", result: "悟" }] },
  { radical: "扌", pairs: [{ component: "口", result: "扣" }, { component: "丁", result: "打" }, { component: "旨", result: "指" }, { component: "巴", result: "把" }, { component: "奐", result: "換" }, { component: "般", result: "搬" }, { component: "軍", result: "揮" }, { component: "是", result: "提" }] },
  { radical: "土", pairs: [{ component: "也", result: "地" }, { component: "寺", result: "堅" }, { component: "曾", result: "增" }, { component: "甬", result: "塘" }, { component: "里", result: "埋" }, { component: "皮", result: "坡" }, { component: "旦", result: "坦" }] },
];
